book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel should have a star of 4 and should be in the expensive price range
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the cheap price range
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 8 people and 2 nights starting from wednesday
If the booking fails how about 1 nights
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the east and should be in the same price range as the hotel
The restaurant should serve international food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 18:45 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
